zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson於1701年3月10日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰安妮 阿盧德爾。她於1721年與Jeremiah York在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特諾廷加姆 堂史普結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1752年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克奧享年51歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克奧 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson于1701年3月10日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰安妮 阿盧德爾。她于1721年与Jeremiah York在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特諾廷加姆 堂史普结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1752年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克奧享年51岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克奧 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson was born on 10 March 1701, in Anne Arundel, Maryland, British Colonial America. She married Jeremiah York in 1721, in Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1752, in Opequon, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 51, and was buried in Opequon Cemetery, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson est née le 10 mars 1701, à Anne Arundel, Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique. Elle a épousé Jeremiah York en 1721, à Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1752, à Opequon, Frederick, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Opequon Cemetery, Frederick, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson wurde am 10. März 1701 in Anne Arundel, Maryland, British Colonial America geboren. Sie hat 1721 in Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America Jeremiah York geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1752 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Opequon, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Opequon Cemetery, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson è nata il il 10 marzo 1701 nel Anne Arundel, Maryland, British Colonial America. Lei sposato Jeremiah York nel 1721, nel Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1752, nel Opequon, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Opequon Cemetery, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilsonは1701年3月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州アン アルンデルで生まれた。1721年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州チェスターノッティンガム トウンシュイップでJeremiah Yorkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1752年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州フレデリックオペクオンで51歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州フレデリックオペクオン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson(은)는 1701년 3월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 앤 아런들에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1721년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 노틴그함 타운시프에서 Jeremiah York(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1752년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크 p크에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크 p크 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson nasceu em 10 de março de 1701, em Anne Arundel, Maryland, British Colonial America. Ela casou-se com Jeremiah York em 1721, em Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1752, em Opequon, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Opequon Cemetery, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson родилась 10 марта 1701 г. в местности анн арундель, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jeremiah York в 1721 г. в местности ноттингхам тоуншип, честир, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1752 г. в местности опекуон, фредирикк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности опекуон кеметири, фредирикк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wilson nació el 10 de marzo de 1701, en Anne Arundel, Maryland, British Colonial America. Se casó con Jeremiah York en 1721, en Nottingham Township, Chester, Pensilvania, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1752, en Opequon, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Opequon Cemetery, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.
